mapper.select: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_number, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(oi2.unit_price * oi2.quantity), 0) FROM order_items oi2 WHERE oi2.order_id = o.order_id) as total_price, oi.order_item_id, oi.product_id, p.product_name, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price, f.flavor_id, CONCAT(f.flavor_name, ' (', oif.quantity, ')') as flavor_name, oif.quantity as flavor_quantity FROM orders o LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id LEFT JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN order_item_flavors oif ON oi.order_item_id = oif.order_item_id LEFT JOIN icecream_flavors f ON oif.flavor_id = f.flavor_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments ( order_id, payment_method, base_amount, product_discount, coupon_discount, point_used, total_discount, final_amount, payment_status, payment_date ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{paymentMethod}, #{baseAmount}, #{productDiscount}, #{couponDiscount}, #{pointUsed}, #{totalDiscount}, #{finalAmount}, #{paymentStatus}, #{paymentDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, total_price = #{finalAmount}, order_status = 'WAITING' WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT uc.user_coupon_id AS userCouponId, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.discount_value AS discountValue, c.discount_type AS discountType, uc.is_used AS isUsed FROM user_coupon uc JOIN coupon c ON uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id JOIN user u ON uc.user_id = u.id WHERE u.phone = #{phone} AND uc.is_used = 0
